Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award Pursuant To Ccp Sections 1285 Et Seq. And For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar May-05-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Abe Lampart, Esq. of the Law Offices of Abe Lampart, PC, Tel. 415.274.0999, for petitioner and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The matter was discussed. After hearing, the Court vacates the tentative ruling and grants PETITIONER BLAYLOCK ROBERT VAN, LLC'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award Pursuant To CCP Sections 1285 Et Seq. And For Entry Of Judgment. The petitioner has demonstrated proper service pursuant to CCP 1290.4. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.
